response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple domains and languages, including C++ and Rust alternatives, but his primary focus has been on web and mobile development rather than geospatial or routing systems. His geospatial experience is limited to an open-source GIS platform (GISCollective), and his expertise in modern distributed systems concepts and low-latency applications is not clearly demonstrated in the routing/tiling context.
strengths: Strong background in C/C++ and modern systems development (e.g., DLang, Node.js, and low-latency apps)
Proven ability to design and build scalable, distributed systems (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic, Kubernetes-based GIS platform)
Experience with optimization and high-performance computing (e.g., real-time metadata handling, caching, asynchronous I/O)
concerns: Lacks direct experience with routing data pipelines, tiling systems, or navigation guidance solutions as required
Primary expertise is in web/mobile development rather than core backend or geospatial systems engineering
No clear evidence of working with modern C++/Rust in a routing/tiling context for production environments
